untranslatable_reason: Signal requires comparison of 'indicator calculated on typical_price' but typical_price is not in the allowed indicator list. Also requires dynamic threshold for time-based exit ([THRESHOLD_NEEDED]) which cannot be resolved. The source text is truncated and does not provide complete specifications for entry/exit logic.
translation_notes: Interpreted the core divergence concept: higher pivot high (high > prev_high) with lower indicator reading (rsi_14 < prev_rsi_14) as a classic bearish divergence setup in uptrend. Used rsi_14 as divergence confirmation indicator. Exit when price closes below swing low (s1). Direction set to LONG as signal describes uptrend context. Cannot implement 'typical_price' indicator input as it is not in allowed list; would need close, high, low composite calculation which is not supported.
